repos.name: groq-coding-agent
repos.description: A Python coding agent powered by Groq (LLaMA 3.3) with an agentic loop and 4 tools .read files, write files, run Python, and list directories.

repos.name: Camera-Code-Snap
repos.description: Convert hand-drawn flowcharts and diagrams into executable code using AI.  This CLI tool analyzes images of flowcharts or agent architecture diagrams and generates clean, functional code in Python or JavaScript.

repos.name: Games-
repos.description: A collection of simple, engaging games built for entertainment and learning. This repository includes a variety of games, starting with a 1 vs 1 Space Fighter game, designed to showcase game mechanics and provide a fun experience. I Built them for Fun and its a great resource for beginners to learn about Game Develpoment.
